biography:
🏡 Investor | ✈️ Pilot | Entrepreneur
Co-Founder @solneststays & @truststack_hq
Helping others build credit, cashflow & freedom 💱

latestPosts.caption:
Book the trip. Hit the slopes. Soak in the mountain views. Repeat. 🏔️✨

#SunPeaksResort #SunPeaksLife #SkiTrip #WinterEscape

Golden hour at Sunburst Chalet 🪵🫖
Firewood. Tea. Stillness. ✨🔥

A quiet kind of luxury.

#SunPeaksResort #sunpeaks #SunburstChalet #SolnestStays

...And then there were 3 🖤🤍 

It's been almost a week since Jetta succumbed to her battle with Lymphoma and it's been the hardest week of all our lives.  She has left a void that is much larger than we ever would have imagined.  Her big personality no longer filling the house brings constant tears and overwhelming waves of grief.  But it brings us peace knowing that we did everything we could for her.  We all cherished every second of our 16 months together since her diagnosis and truly made every second count!

The 5 of us will eventually adjust but our pack leader will always be our Jetta/Jetta Bear/Jetta Wetta 🤍🖤
